description: SOP library — implementation-ready procedures for BEST Group / NirvaCore. Each SOP lists trigger, ordered steps, the business rules it enforces (`rules` → business_rules.json), standards_kb `controls`/`standards`, and `automation` (what NIRVA does vs the human). Built for real, multi-site, deskless operations — not theory.

sops.title: Site Check-in & Headcount Verification
sops.trigger: Worker arrives for an assigned shift
steps: Worker opens NIRVA CHECK on bound device at the site
App captures geo (site fence) + liveness selfie + timestamp
Rule WF-002 validates integrity; unverified check-ins are quarantined
Supervisor sees live required-vs-actual; Rule WF-001 alerts on gaps
End of shift: check-out captured; hours computed for payroll feed
sops.automation: NIRVA auto-verifies, alerts, and reconciles billable headcount; human handles only the quarantine queue & SLA variances.

sops.title: Shift Rostering & No-Show Recovery
steps: Build roster from contract headcount per site
Publish to workers; capture acknowledgement
On no-show (WF-001), auto-notify standby pool
Log replacement; update required-vs-actual & SLA exposure
sops.automation: Auto roster suggestions + standby dispatch; human approves roster.

sops.title: Monthly Payroll Run
steps: Pull verified hours from check-in (single source of truth)
Rule PAY-001 locks time records; Rule PAY-002 enforces preparer≠approver
Compute gross, OT (PAY-003), deductions (SSO PAY-005, WHT PAY-006); floor check PAY-004
Generate payslips with protection (PAY-007); approver signs off
Disburse; file PND.1 & SSO; archive evidence (EV-FINCTRL)
sops.automation: Auto-calculation & filing prep; human does final approval (SoD) and exception handling.

sops.title: Procure-to-Pay
steps: Requester submits request with budget line
Approval by threshold; PO issued; vendor must pass DD (PROC-003)
Goods/service received & confirmed on site
Three-way match (PROC-001); split-detection (PROC-002); bank check (PROC-004)
WHT applied (TAX-001); payment; audit trail retained
sops.automation: Auto match, anomaly flags, WHT calc; human approves PO & resolves flags.

sops.title: Document & Record Control
sops.trigger: Create or revise a controlled document
steps: Draft in NIRVA DOCS; assign owner & approver
Rule ISO-001 enforces version/approval/effective date
Publish; supersede prior; set retention
Link document to the processes/tasks/training that use it
sops.automation: Auto-versioning, distribution, retention; human authors & approves.
sops.replaces: Multiple PDF/Word versions in folders & chats

sops.title: Internal Audit & CAPA
steps: Plan audit (scope, criteria, auditor independence)
Conduct; capture findings with evidence
Raise CAPA; assign owner & due date; Rule ISO-002 escalates overdue
Verify effectiveness; close; feed management review
sops.automation: Auto evidence collection (EV-* pack), scheduling, escalation; auditor judges.
sops.replaces: Last-minute audit scramble, Excel finding logs

sops.title: Personal-Data Intake & Consent
sops.trigger: A new data source / processing activity is introduced
steps: Classify data (incl. sensitive §26); determine lawful basis
Capture consent where required (PDPA-001); record in RoPA (PDPA-002)
Apply minimization, access control & encryption
Set retention; register DSAR & breach workflows (PDPA-003/004)
sops.automation: Auto consent logging, RoPA prompts, DSAR SLA timers; DPO reviews.
sops.replaces: PII in open Excel/LINE with no consent record

sops.title: Complaint Handling
steps: Capture & categorize (CX-001); acknowledge to customer
Assign owner; resolve within SLA; communicate outcome
If systemic → raise CAPA (links to SOP-ISO-AUDIT)
Track CSAT trend (CX-002); flag churn risk pre-renewal
sops.automation: Auto-capture from channels, SLA timers, trend alerts; human resolves.

sops.title: Permit-to-Work for High-Risk Tasks
sops.trigger: Work at height / hot work / confined space / electrical
steps: Request permit; verify worker competency & valid training (ISO-003)
Risk assessment & PPE confirmation; Rule OHS-001 blocks start without permit
Supervisor authorizes; work proceeds with monitoring
Close permit; log; capture any near-miss (OHS-002)
sops.automation: Auto competency/permit checks, escalation; supervisor authorizes on site.

sops.title: NOVA Agent Operation & Review
sops.trigger: A NOVA agent is tasked with operational/compliance work
steps: Agent acts within scoped data & purpose; all actions logged (AI-002)
For consequential output (pay/employment/vendor/compliance) → human review (AI-001)
Reviewer signs off or rejects; decision + reviewer recorded
Evidence retained for AI governance (model card, logs)
sops.automation: Agent drafts/analyzes; human owns judgment & accountability.
